introSection: Mini Willys Coaster is a steel roller coaster located at Kampung Willys Kang Cuya in Pasanggrahan, West Java, Indonesia.

sections.title: Design
sections.content:
Riders board the coaster on the bottom level of a tower that it shares with Kursi Layang, a ride operator then pushes the car onto a elevator lift, this lift is operated manually by another operator with a handheld controll, the car is then pushed off of the tower's second level into the layout, a simple out and back, at the end of the layout, a ride operator helps the cars align with a small car on a perpindicular track, this car is pulled up the lift hill by a cable, once the car reaches the top, an operator manually pushes switch track-turntable hybrid, spinning the car around and returning it to the loading positon.

The coaster does not feature block brakes, and multiple cars are dispatched at the same time.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Adult riders must ride alone, but if they have a small child, they may ride with them.

fullText:
Mini Willys Coaster is a steel roller coaster located at Kampung Willys Kang Cuya in Pasanggrahan, West Java, Indonesia.

Riders board the coaster on the bottom level of a tower that it shares with Kursi Layang, a ride operator then pushes the car onto a elevator lift, this lift is operated manually by another operator with a handheld controll, the car is then pushed off of the tower's second level into the layout, a simple out and back, at the end of the layout, a ride operator helps the cars align with a small car on a perpindicular track, this car is pulled up the lift hill by a cable, once the car reaches the top, an operator manually pushes switch track-turntable hybrid, spinning the car around and returning it to the loading positon.

The coaster does not feature block brakes, and multiple cars are dispatched at the same time.

Adult riders must ride alone, but if they have a small child, they may ride with them.
